With the essence of Indian roots, crafted with a focus on the traditional, this kurta with Kalamkari print sets the tone for an all new formal trend for women. The word Kalamkari comes from the Persian ‘Kalam’ – ‘kari’ meaning ‘drawing with a pen’. This style is around three centuries old - Kalamkari was adopted by printing communities and most of the production is now hand block printed. The intricate designs, elaborate borders and understanding of balanced composition has given Kalamkari its well-deserved place as a popular design. Wear this with patialas or fitted churidars. Hand block printing is one of the three main techniques used for fabric decoration. Skilled artisans carve the required design into hard wood to make the blocks, which are the essential tools for printing. These blocks are dipped sequentially into a dye bath and stamped onto the fabric with skilled precision. A separate block is used for each colour, some fabrics may have as many as 500 block repeats per metre! Pair this unique piece with colourful cotton trousers to go all out and make a colour block statement. For the more conservative, pair it with simple form fitting denims and sandals. description: PULSE WITH ENERGY Gift your feet an energy drink with the reebok ZigTech shoes. This reebok ZigDhoni shoe, dedicated to the captain of the Indian cricket Team who led the nation to an ICC World Cup victory this year, these are Reebok’s most technically advanced training shoes. The ZigTech range allows key leg muscles to strain less so that you can do more with that energy. Using a patented sole technology, Reebok’s ZigTech model of shoes conserve and return energy offering a soft and springy ride. The zigs in these shoes absorb vibrations from the impact and take that energy around to return them to the runner in the form of a quiet, smooth springy effect. Promising mush lesser muscle activation, this springy move allows the wearer to run longer. Invisible force trailing along The newest of running and cross training shoes from Reebok, the shoe is created with a technology the stretches out a little to accommodate those with wider feet; but on the whole, it’s created for a snug Fit and in a true to size format. The Reebok Zig range of shoes is created with a zig zag outsole made of carbon rubber heel. The Zig technology absorbs impact during initial heel strike and sends a wave of momentum along the entire length of the foot, propelling the individual forward, adding greater traction. Such has been the propulsion factor that many sportspersons have actually claimed that they’ve felt some invisible force pushing them forward. Substantial sole for stable runs Created with a lightweight fabric upper, there is ample ventilation for the feet keeping the feet dry and comfortable even during a heavy round of exercise and training. The lightweight of the upper is contrasted with a slightly more substantial sole to ensure ample stability to the wearer, making it possibly the best sneaker ever created for the serious runner or cross trainer. So just add on an iPod and run away to health. description: The first of the ZigTech range of reebok shoes, the reebok ZigFuel is a huge favourite among those who love to run and feel the energy returning with every stride. Built with patented sole technology, the reebok ZigFuel maximizes energy return to the feet, offering a soft and springy ride: a complete energy drink for your feet that makes your key leg muscles so that you can do more. Fuel your every stride Replete with a DMX Sheer cushioning that minimizes shock on impact, and a PU sockliner that provides a smooth, cushioned and silky touch to the feet, the Reebok ZigFuel is one of the lightest cross trainers ever created. The upper is made of synthetic mesh and overlays for ample breathability and structural support. It is also employed with reflective properties to make tech shoe visible and safe even in low light conditions. Equipped with a padded tongue, collar and soft inner lining, the Reebok ZigFuel provides an absolutely snug and comfortable Fit. The outsole of the shoe is designed in the patented zig-zag pattern using DMX Shear foam. This is separated into a different panel altogether from heel to mid-foot and onto the forefoot to reduce impact on key muscle groups when running, providing a smooth heel to toe transition. Energetic from kick-off Light and energetic from the word Go, the Reebok ZigFuel reduces impact on the heel, which is especially beneficial for midfoot to heelstrike runners who land on their heels first. The Zig technology, coupled with the DMX Shear cushioning panels reduces impact and evenly distributes shock, returning maximum energy to the feet. This reduced heel stress and extra comfort allows you to run longer and stronger. In short, if you're looking for a shoe that adds fuel to your runs with that extra cushioned support and strainless experience for your shins, feet and glutes, the ZigFuel is what you need. description: PULSE WITH ENERGY Gift your feet an energy drink with the reebok ZigTech shoes. These reebok ZigDhoni shoes dedicated to the captain of the Indian cricket Team who led the nation to an ICC World Cup victory this year are Reebok’s most technically advanced training shoes. The ZigTech range allows key leg muscles to strain less so that you can do more with that energy. Using a patented sole technology, Reebok’s ZigTech model of shoes conserve and return energy offering a soft and springy ride. The zigs in these shoes absorb vibrations from the impact and take that energy around to return them to the runner in the form of a quiet, smooth springy effect. Promising mush lesser muscle activation, this springy move allows the wearer to run longer. Invisible force trailing along The newest of running and cross training shoes from Reebok, the shoe is created with a technology the stretches out a little to accommodate those with wider feet; but on the whole, it’s created for a snug Fit and in a true to size format. The Reebok Zig range of shoes is created with a zig zag outsole made of carbon rubber heel. The Zig technology absorbs impact during initial heel strike and sends a wave of momentum along the entire length of the foot, propelling the individual forward, adding greater traction. Such has been the propulsion factor that many sportspersons have actually claimed that they’ve felt some invisible force pushing them forward. Substantial sole for stable runs Created with a lightweight fabric upper, there is ample ventilation for the feet keeping the feet dry and comfortable even during a heavy round of exercise and training. The lightweight of the upper is contrasted with a slightly more substantial sole to ensure ample stability to the wearer, making it possibly the best sneaker ever created for the serious runner or cross trainer. So just add on an iPod and run away to health. description: NEW HITS ON THE BLOCK An absolute hard court classic, the adidas Barricade 6.0 shoe is a best selling, highest performance tennis shoe ever created world over. An improvised and bettered version of the adidas Barricade, the version 6.0 tennis shoes has been re-engineered with three TPU overlay strips that represent the Adidas logo of perseverance and strength, as well as adds that extra stability to the upper. It also has a stability claw technology for quick cuts and fast footwork, making it a sure-footed performance shoe. Besides, the forefoot of this range of shoes is employed with AdiPRENE+ technology to maintain propulsion and enhance efficiency during a game of hard court tennis. AdiPRENE+ is a technology where resilient cushioning is used to protect the forefoot and provide a responsive and dynamic toe-off, ensuring a faster and springier gait. Easing out your moves An ideal combination of durability, cushioning and support, Adidas Barricade 6.0 shoes also have AdiPRENE inserts made of highly shock absorbent material in the heel to enhance cushioning and protect the feet from impact. This makes it the most preferred and best selling hard court tennis shoes for players who are both under and over pronators. Weighing just about 482 grams, the Adidas Barricade range of tennis shoes are made of lightweight uppers and ultra durable TPU toe guards. Added to this lightweight comfort is a textile lining and moulded EVA insole that makes the shoe snugly wrap around the foot and ensure anatomical comfort. Complete with comfort features, the Adidas Barricade 6.0 version of tennis shoes are engineered with a Torsion System in the midfoot, ensuring absolute motion control during both, linear and lateral movement. Torsionability is the foot’s ability to adapt to any surface, without forcing the rearfoot to excessively move and stress itself out. The Adidas Torsion System, therefore, protects the feet from injuries, providing that much-required comfort and support especially when playing tennis on hard courts. For the hard players If you are talking about the ultimate in durability for outsoles, there’s nothing to look beyond the AdiWEAR 6 technology employed in Adidas Barricade 6.0 shoes. Specially designed to suit hard court tennis shoes, the AdiWEAR technology enhance durability of the outsole, elongating shoe life by reducing wear and tear. If you love a hard round of tennis, then look no further than this Adidas Barricade 6.0 shoe for absolute performance. Stylish and comfortable, you can also own a separate pair for casual wear around the town. description: Originally designed as a cross training shoe, the nike Air Max Trainer Excel has become a big time favourite gym footwear. Replete with a meshed upper and cushioned footbed, and weighing all of about 280 grams, the nike Air Max Trainer Excel is an absolute comfort, maximizing workout sessions. Styled with an aesthetic appeal and engineered with comfort, the Nike Air Max Trainer Excel has a nearly meshed upper that ensures ample ventilation and breathability, keeping the feet dry and comfortable during those sweaty sessions. The uppers are constructed using synthetic overlays to ensure a lockdown Fit. Added to this is a lightly padded tongue and collar that ensures a comfortable, snug fit, while the lace-up system provides an even better snug and supportive fit. The lacing system is integrated with Nike’s revolutionary Flywire technology with its high strength threadwork, like that of cables used in suspension bridges, constructed exactly at those places where the foot needs that extra support. Run on air even on rock The forefoot inner sleeve is seamless and has an underlay support frame for that extra stability and comfort. The insole of the Nike Air Max Trainer Excel shoe has a textile lining that fits snugly around the foot, enhancing shock absorption and keeping the feet safe from impact. The shock absorption technology in the Nike Air Max Trainer Excel has a low profile phylon midsole that is employed with a 180° Max Air unit to provide optimal cushioning and impact protection. The comfort factor doesn’t end just here. The phylite midsole and outsole are fused to reduce the overall weight. The outsole of the Nike Air Max Trainer Excel is constructed with siped flex grooves on the forefoot to provide that ultimate multi-directional flexibility, while the strategically placed rubber pods on the outsole enhance traction and durability, making this rubber outsole engineered shoe an absolute pleasure to wear during training sessions. description: AN ACE FOR THE ACERS  If what you need is speed, traction and stability on the tennis court, look no further than the nike Zoom Vapor Club tennis shoes. An update of the classic silhouette, the nike Zoom Vapor Club is constructed with the best of modern technology coupled with premium cushioning, durability and support. Built with a performance-driven design, these tennis shoes are light in weight and offer a springy bounce. Designed in a high performance style, this range of tennis shoes provide the ultimate in durability and traction.  The synthetic uppers of the Nike Zoom Vapor Club shoes are made of lightweight leather upper with durability regionalised and reinforced in the toe tip made of XDR and medial part of the forefoot. The upper is well perforated to provide ultimate ventilation and breathability for the feet, keeping them dry and comfortable.  Lateral moves made easy  Engineered with a full length phylon material midsole and a Nike Zoom unit in the heel, the Nike Zoom Vapor Club range of shoes have an absolutely high level cushioning ensuring a springy bounce that gives the ultimate comfort during side-to-side movements on the tennis court.  To make side-to-side movements even more convenient for tennis players, the Nike Zoom Vapor Club shoe is specially designed to frame the heel and has an outrigger ion the outsole.  Added to this cushioning and stability is the herringbone pattern on the rubber outsole that ensures maximum traction and durability of the shoe. The outsole is also created out of a single piece TPU shank that enhances stability. The flex grooves on the lateral side of the outsole provide a natural feel of the tennis court, allowing more flexibility of the sole, while the pivot point enhances traction.  On the whole, the Nike Zoom Vapor Club is a personal favourite of some of the best tennis players the world over, who love that springy, supported bounce across the tennis court. description: SHAPED FOR YOUR EVERY STRIDE  Incredibly  lightweight with a smooth transition, the nike LunarElite+ model of  shoes for men are designed for those who love to run. Without  sacrificing on cushioning and shock absorption, the nike LunarElite+  range of shoes is designed in such a manner that it adapts to your  stride &ndash  be it long or short.  Great deal for underpronators and overpronators  The Nike  LunarElite+ range of shoes are specially engineered for runners with  underpronated to moderately overpronated gait. Underpronated and  overpronated runners strike the ground at the lateral side of the heel.  As the individual transfers weight from the heel to the metatarsus, the  foot doesn&rsquo t roll enough in the medial (inside) direction for  overpronators and in the lateral (outside) direction for underpronators,  which could affect the knee as the foot doesn&rsquo t absorb shock properly.  However, the difference lies in the fact that in an underpronator, the  ankles do not experience much motion and are rigid, while in an  overpronator, the ankles roll inwards making one fall forward easily.  Nike realized that it had the responsibility to create the right running shoes that could cater to both underpronators and overpronators, with  ample support on both, the lateral and medial sides. This responsibility  that it took up resulted in the creation of the Nike LunarElite+ model  of shoes.  360 degrees of comfort  Without  sacrificing on cushioning, the Nike LunarElite+ range of shoes was  created with ultra-light, yet ultra-strong Flywire upper. The Flywire is  a lightweight support system that is made of tensile fibres that are  joined together to create a foundation to construct the upper material  of the shoe. It acts like a super strong synthetic ligament, wrapping  around the foot and supporting it precisely where it needs that extra  support, mapping the foot morphology like an X-ray. Flywire acts like  the second skin giving the runner that ultimate freedom and strength in  moving backwards, forwards, sideways, up and down. Think of the  direction and Nike LunarElite+ shoes will help you move that way with  complete convenience, locking your foot down.  This  range of shoes is created with open mesh uppers with strategic overlays  for enhanced support at targeted areas of the upper foot to enhance  performance, comfort and breathability. The no-sew design employed in  key zones ensure proper fitting and enhance comfort.  To add to  this snug Fit of the upper is the Lunarlon cushioning system in the  midsole that adds on a plush cushioning to absorb shock protecting the  feet, besides adding that extra spring in gait. The dynamic support  system adapts to the runner&rsquo s stride, adding that specific support to  every phase of the run.  Ultimate in protection  Besides,  Nike LunarElite+ shoes are engineered with a dual layer Ortholite insole  that is strong and breathable, replete with anti-microbial foam, making  this model of shoes ideal for athletes. The cushioned sockliner is made  of long lasting material and adds an exceptional step-in feel, while  the memory foam at the collar ensures absolute comfort and fit.  The Nike  LunarElite+ range of shoes are made of environmentally preferred rubber  and employ a modified waffle outsole that makes the shoes durable and  multi-surface tractional. The heel unit is made of highly durable carbon  rubber, reducing wear and tear, while the flex grooves enhance  flexibility, ensuring a smooth and efficient Nike run.  Shoe care 1. Brush surface with a soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust 2. Do not machine wash

description: EXPERIENCE THE JOY OF FRESH RUNS  An  absolutely dynamic running shoe, the nike Lunarswift+ offers seamless  comfort, distance-busting cushioning and runner specific support.  Offering soft cushioning and support with every stride, the nike Lunarswift+ features a LunarLite cushioning system that ensures a  springy effect for the feet.  The Nike  Lunarswift+ range of shoes a low profile midsole that ensures a firmer  feel to the underfoot. It&rsquo s a highly recommended shoe for underpronators  and overpronators with ample cushioning and stability provided in the  medial and lateral side of the shoe.  Breezy touch to snug shoes  With a  stitchless upper, Nike Lunarswift+ shoes reduce irritation to the feet  and enhance the comfort factor. The upper of these shoes are constructed  using lightweight synthetic mesh and synthetic overlays ensuring ample  ventilation for the feet, keeping them dry and comfortable even during  long runs. To test the breathability aspect, wear really thin socks and  move around in the Nike Lunarswift+ and feel the breeze moving in and  out. Added to this is a robust heel counter that provides an absolutely  snug and secure Fit to the rearfoot.  Adapts to the runner's needs  Light in  weight and weighing just about 306 grams, this range of shoes are  employed with Lunarlon cushioning system in the midsole that is made up  of a soft, resilient foam core. This is encased in a supportive foam  carrier ensuring a lightweight blend of plush cushioning and springy  response. This support platform is dynamic enough to respond to the  runner&rsquo s changing needs. It adopts to the wearer&rsquo s stride through each  run giving the right amount of support and stability.  No wonder  overpronators prefer the Nike Lunarswift+ as the wedged carrier foam in  the Lunarlon system limits excessive pronation, without adding weight  or stiffness of a traditional medial post. When it comes to neutral  pronators, this pronation control feature is not activated. For such  runners, the dynamic support platform enhances cushioning, converting  this same shoe into a neutral running shoe.  Stay safe in the dark  The  outsole of the Nike Lunarswift+ has flex grooves along its length and  breadth ensuring flexibility in every stride. Constructed with an  outsole using environmentally preferred rubber and a waffle pattern  outsole, the shoe is absolutely high on traction and durability. Added  to these features are the reflective elements used in the shoe to ensure  that you are visible even when running in low visibility conditions,  keeping you safe.  Belonging  to the Nike+ range, the Nike Lunarswift+ is compatible with all Nike+  products and actually talks to your iPod nano and other compatible  guaging devices. So enjoy those long runs through all seasons in this  pleasurable range of Nike Lunarswift+ shoes.  Upper   Open mesh upper made of synthetic leather for ample breathability  Microfibre synthetic overlays in the forefoot and rearfoot for snug fit  Heel counter moulded onto the shoe and wrapped around rearfoot for stability of the heel  Moulded sockliner anatomically placed for underfoot cushioning and ergonomical comfort   Midsole   LunarLite technology employed with foam core bonded to a phylon carrier for enhanced cushioning and increased energy return  Dynamic support layers along the foam core to produce a denser medial midsole to reduce overpronation  Cuboid pod in lower lateral side of midfoot   Outsole   BRS 1000 carbon rubber on the heel counter for added durability  EPR forefoot for multi-surface traction  Waffle outsole design on forefoot for multi-surface traction and cushioning   Wash care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash

description: EXPERIENCE THE JOY OF FRESH RUNS An absolutely dynamic running shoe, the nike Lunarswift+ offers seamless comfort, distance-busting cushioning and runner specific support. Offering soft cushioning and support with every stride, the nike Lunarswift+ features a LunarLite cushioning system that ensures a springy effect for the feet. The Nike Lunarswift+ range of shoes a low profile midsole that ensures a firmer feel to the underfoot. It’s a highly recommended shoe for underpronators and overpronators with ample cushioning and stability provided in the medial and lateral side of the shoe. Breezy touch to snug shoes With a stitchless upper, Nike Lunarswift+ shoes reduce irritation to the feet and enhance the comfort factor. The upper of these shoes are constructed using lightweight synthetic mesh and synthetic overlays ensuring ample ventilation for the feet, keeping them dry and comfortable even during long runs. To test the breathability aspect, wear really thin socks and move around in the Nike Lunarswift+ and feel the breeze moving in and out. Added to this is a robust heel counter that provides an absolutely snug and secure Fit to the rearfoot. Adapts to the runner's needs Light in weight and weighing just about 306 grams, this range of shoes are employed with Lunarlon cushioning system in the midsole that is made up of a soft, resilient foam core. This is encased in a supportive foam carrier ensuring a lightweight blend of plush cushioning and springy response. This support platform is dynamic enough to respond to the runner’s changing needs. It adopts to the wearer’s stride through each run giving the right amount of support and stability. No wonder overpronators prefer the Nike Lunarswift+ as the wedged carrier foam in the Lunarlon system limits excessive pronation, without adding weight or stiffness of a traditional medial post. When it comes to neutral pronators, this pronation control feature is not activated. For such runners, the dynamic support platform enhances cushioning, converting this same shoe into a neutral running shoe. Stay safe in the dark The outsole of the Nike Lunarswift+ has flex grooves along its length and breadth ensuring flexibility in every stride. Constructed with an outsole using environmentally preferred rubber and a waffle pattern outsole, the shoe is absolutely high on traction and durability. Added to these features are the reflective elements used in the shoe to ensure that you are visible even when running in low visibility conditions, keeping you safe. Belonging to the Nike+ range, the Nike Lunarswift+ is compatible with all Nike+ products and actually talks to your iPod nano and other compatible gauging devices. So enjoy those long runs through all seasons in this pleasurable range of Nike Lunarswift+ shoes. Upper   Open mesh upper made of synthetic leather for ample breathability  Microfiber synthetic overlays in the forefoot and rearfoot for snug fit  Heel counter moulded onto the shoe and wrapped around rearfoot for stability of the heel  Moulded sockliner anatomically placed for underfoot cushioning and ergonomical comfort   Midsole   LunarLite technology employed with foam core bonded to a phylon carrier for enhanced cushioning and increased energy return  Dynamic support layers along the foam core to produce a denser medial midsole to reduce overpronation  Cuboid pod in lower lateral side of midfoot   Outsole   BRS 1000 carbon rubber on the heel counter for added durability  EPR forefoot for multi-surface traction  Waffle outsole design on forefoot for multi-surface traction and cushioning   Shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash

description: HIGH TECH MACHINE, SIMPLY DESIGNED When hardcore durability meets soft, cushioned touch, you get what's called the adidas Response Cushion 19. An absolute dream-come-true for a runner, the adidas Response Cushion 19 boasts of an increased cushioning all around the foot making it a pleasure for the feet. With a meshed material on the inside and outside of the upper, the feet are provided with ample breathability and ventilation in these shoes. Now that the feet are safe from getting heavy with sweat and chances of infection ruled out in these shoes, Adidas added on its trademark three stripes in the form of synthetic overlays on the upper, anchoring the laces and keeping them locked in place for enhanced midfoot function and support. Stability at its best Weighing all of just about 349 grams for men's shoes and 281 grams for women's shoes, the Adidas Response Cushion 19 features a Torsion system in the midsole for enhanced stability that ensures a lesser side-to-side foot movement and more efficient heelstrike to forefoot motion. In fact, most users of the Adidas Response Cushion 19 vouch for its midfoot support system that makes this shoe absolutely energy efficient and comfortable. A high tech running machine hidden under a simple design, the durability of the Adidas Response Cushion 19 is driven by the trademark AdiWEAR system in the outsole. This outsole is made of tough rubber that not only enhances shoe life, but also promotes traction at its best. As a cherry on the icing, the Adidas Response Cushion 19 shoe has also employed an adiPRENE system that provides ultimate cushioning and impact protection, retaining foot propulsion keeping the runner moving forward without wasting energy unnecessarily. If running is what gives you the greatest pleasure, then grab for yourself this Adidas Response Cushion 19, add on an iPod to your enjoyment and enjoy long runs in the wilderness. Wash care 1. CLASSIC TREAT ON THE RUN  The nike Air Max+ 2001 is popular among acknowledged groups.    Offering premium quality and comfort, myntra has jumped the line to    bring to you the best of the best running shoes in town. Designed with    maximum cushioning and seamless Fit, there's no better running shoe  than   the nike Air Max+ 2011. This range of shoes from Nike is one of  the   most preferred lot world over as it is not only lightweight  (weighs only   about 13.8 ounces), but also offers ample cushioning and  protection,   which is especially beneficial for runners who weigh about  20 pounds or   more than normal.  Maintaining its high standard in impact protection for more than 20    years now, the Nike Air range is probably the most durable, versatile    and revolutionary range of shoes that has created a new meaning of    encapsulating air for cushioning footstrike in athletic shoes. An    improvisation of its popular predecessor, the Nike Air Max+ 2011 has a    lightweight upper and a plusher fit and feel. It is replete with a    stylishly designed meshed upper and inner sleeve to enhance ventilation    for the feet and keep them safe from sweat and resultant diseases.   After  all, a dry and comfortable fit will help you concentrate on your    instead of worrying about uneasily sweaty and heavy feet.  Injury safeguards  When running, the repetitive downward force of the feet during their    contact with the ground can wreck havoc to the body and affect    performance drastically. Nike has ensured that its running shoes are    built to absorb shock and keep the feet safe from impact-related    injuries. Hence, employed with Air Max technology, this pair of Air Max+    2011 shoes is designed for the serious runner with maximum cushioning    to absorb impact. It is engineered with a fully visible shock   absorption  unit to provide ample cushioning for the feet by creating an   air bag  that takes all the pounding helping you run fast and wide.  The  entire  midsole is made of Cushlon technology to enhance springy   resilience,  ensuring you enjoy a smoother and more natural motion, with   maximum  impact protection.  Run light, firm and healthy  The upper of the Nike Air Max+ 2011 range of shoes is featured with    Hyperfuse technology, wherein several materials are fused together for    incredibly lightweight comfort and extra durability and breathability    without any glue or stitching. The mesh inner sleeve, which is also    called the bootie, wraps completely around the foot, adding to it a    plush feel and enhancing ventilation at the same time.  These shoes also have moulded collars around the ankles to reduce    slippage and increase grip and stability. The rubber outsole employs a    waffle pattern and lugs around the perimeter for durability and    traction. The flex grooves enhance flexibility of the feet and, coupled    with the cushioned outsole, they ensure a smoother heel to toe    transition.  Performance trackers  With the Nike+ range, it is extremely easy to track your time,    distance, pace and the number of calories you've burned. description: FOR THOSE WHO LOVE BAREFOOT COMFORT Maximizing the foot's natural range of motion while offering maximum protection and cushioning for a smooth ride, the nike Free Run+ 2 is designed to work with the intricate movement of the barefoot by locking the foot in place and at the same time not restricting movement. INSPIRED BY STANFORD ATHLETES nike learnt that Stanford athletes were training barefoot on the university's golf course, and soon enough set out to create a shoe that felt natural and wieghtless, offering a barefoot feel. In 2002, they set out to measure the insole pressure in a set of women and men to understand the biomechanics of shoeless running. After researching the findings, Nike set about to create one of the most unconventional and flexible shoes what we today know as the Nike Free Run+ 2. Featuring a Nike+ Ready option, this shoe can be teamed with Nike+ compatible iPods, Stop watches and much more to clock your fitness regime. description: EXPERIENCE THE JOY OF FRESH RUNS An absolutely dynamic running shoe, the nike Lunarswift+ offers seamless comfort, distance-busting cushioning and runner specific support. Offering soft cushioning and support with every stride, the nike Lunarswift+ features a LunarLite cushioning system that ensures a springy effect for the feet. The Nike Lunarswift+ range of shoes a low profile midsole that ensures a firmer feel to the underfoot. It’s a highly recommended shoe for underpronators and overpronators with ample cushioning and stability provided in the medial and lateral side of the shoe. Breezy touch to snug shoes With a stitchless upper, Nike Lunarswift+ shoes reduce irritation to the feet and enhance the comfort factor. The upper of these shoes are constructed using lightweight synthetic mesh and synthetic overlays ensuring ample ventilation for the feet, keeping them dry and comfortable even during long runs. To test the breathability aspect, wear really thin socks and move around in the Nike Lunarswift+ and feel the breeze moving in and out. Added to this is a robust heel counter that provides an absolutely snug and secure Fit to the rearfoot. Adapts to the runner's needs Light in weight and weighing just about 306 grams, this range of shoes are employed with Lunarlon cushioning system in the midsole that is made up of a soft, resilient foam core. This is encased in a supportive foam carrier ensuring a lightweight blend of plush cushioning and springy response. This support platform is dynamic enough to respond to the runner’s changing needs. It adopts to the wearer’s stride through each run giving the right amount of support and stability. No wonder overpronators prefer the Nike Lunarswift+ as the wedged carrier foam in the Lunarlon system limits excessive pronation, without adding weight or stiffness of a traditional medial post. When it comes to neutral pronators, this pronation control feature is not activated. For such runners, the dynamic support platform enhances cushioning, converting this same shoe into a neutral running shoe. Stay safe in the dark The outsole of the Nike Lunarswift+ has flex grooves along its length and breadth ensuring flexibility in every stride. Constructed with an outsole using environmentally preferred rubber and a waffle pattern outsole, the shoe is absolutely high on traction and durability. Added to these features are the reflective elements used in the shoe to ensure that you are visible even when running in low visibility conditions, keeping you safe. Belonging to the Nike+ range, the Nike Lunarswift+ is compatible with all Nike+ products and actually talks to your iPod nano and other compatible gauging devices. So enjoy those long runs through all seasons in this pleasurable range of Nike Lunarswift+ shoes. description: GLIDE THROUGH DAILY RUNS  An  update of the most successful nike LunarGlide series, the nike LunarGlide 2 running shoes is one of the most advanced running shoes you  can ever find in the market. One of the most responsive shoes for  people of all types of gaits, the LunarGlide performs excellently even  under tough conditions besides looking absolutely stylish. This makes it  an ideal shoe for a wide range of runners, including underpronators and  overpronators.  An all-rounder for all runners  The Nike  LunarGlide 2 is engineered with extra cushioning across the length of  the shoe, with special focus on the areas of the foot that need that  extra support and comfort. This makes the LunarGlide 2 a hot favourite  among runners who prone to impact related injuries as it not only  enhances shock absorption, but also provides a solid base that helps you  spring with every stride. The LunarGlide 2 has a Lunarlon system in the  midsole that adds on a plush cushioning to absorb shock protecting the  feet, besides adding that extra spring in gait. This adapts to your  running style and offers complete support, making it one of the safest  running shoes to pick especially if you are not too sure what kind of a  gait you have.  The Nike  LunarGlide 2 shoes are constructed with a lot of mesh on the upper to  ensure ample ventilation for the feet and keep them dry and comfortable  even during long runs. The shoeliner is employed with a unique climate  control system that keeps the shoe itself dry and fresh wicking away  moisture, ensuring that your feet are free from blisters.  On the  whole, the stylish design and comfort factor together have always kept  the Nike LunarGlide range of shoes at the top of the priority and  favourite list of runners the world over. REVOLUTION COMES IN AIRY PACKAGES The nike Air Max 90 is a retro running shoe engineered with a max Air unit in the heel for ultimate cushioning and comfort. Let’s rewind a wee bit to understand what’s so special about the nike Air Max 90. Nike created its revolutionary Air Sole unit for its footwear way back in the 1970s. A decade and a half later, around 1987, the Nike Air Max shoe debuted and it’s window in the heel became an instant hit. All of a sudden shoe wearers started feeling air sole comfort, or should we say started seeing such comfort in the heel. With this revolutionary shoe becoming such a hit worldover, Nike went on to create various models on these lines, and after much research was born the Nike Air Max 90. description: Style Note The salomon Quest 4D GTX boots is a heavy duty hiking shoe that performs well if you're a light/fast to medium hiker. The brand considered its trail-running shoe and used the design for a backpacking boot. A pair for the pros, this shoe provides great arch support and is roomy around the toes (unlike most hiking boots) The USP of this boot is its 4D Advanced Chassis that controls flex, reduces ankle strain, enhances stability and protects feet from rough terrain. The secure heel cupping enhances the stability of the boot and the lateral ankle support renders this pair great for climbing or descending. The shoe exhibits good traction on rocks, sand, landscapes with tree roots and grass  furthermore, the sturdy rubber capping protects the toe against accidental stubbing while in the wild. Bottom line - this is a lightweight boot with excellent stability and support without the typical unwieldiness of hiking shoes. Weighing 649.2 grams, this is great for urban wear as well. description: EXPERIENCE THE JOY OF FRESH RUNS An absolutely dynamic running shoe, the nike Lunarswift+ offers seamless comfort, distance-busting cushioning and runner specific support. Offering soft cushioning and support with every stride, the nike Lunarswift+ features a LunarLite cushioning system that ensures a springy effect for the feet. The Nike Lunarswift+ range of shoes a low profile midsole that ensures a firmer feel to the underfoot. It’s a highly recommended shoe for underpronators and overpronators with ample cushioning and stability provided in the medial and lateral side of the shoe. Breezy touch to snug shoes With a stitchless upper, Nike Lunarswift+ shoes reduce irritation to the feet and enhance the comfort factor. The upper of these shoes are constructed using lightweight synthetic mesh and synthetic overlays ensuring ample ventilation for the feet, keeping them dry and comfortable even during long runs. To test the breathability aspect, wear really thin socks and move around in the Nike Lunarswift+ and feel the breeze moving in and out. Added to this is a robust heel counter that provides an absolutely snug and secure Fit to the rearfoot. Adapts to the runner's needs Light in weight and weighing just about 306 grams, this range of shoes are employed with Lunarlon cushioning system in the midsole that is made up of a soft, resilient foam core. This is encased in a supportive foam carrier ensuring a lightweight blend of plush cushioning and springy response. This support platform is dynamic enough to respond to the runner’s changing needs. It adopts to the wearer’s stride through each run giving the right amount of support and stability. No wonder overpronators prefer the Nike Lunarswift+ as the wedged carrier foam in the Lunarlon system limits excessive pronation, without adding weight or stiffness of a traditional medial post. When it comes to neutral pronators, this pronation control feature is not activated. For such runners, the dynamic support platform enhances cushioning, converting this same shoe into a neutral running shoe. Stay safe in the dark The outsole of the Nike Lunarswift+ has flex grooves along its length and breadth ensuring flexibility in every stride. Constructed with an outsole using environmentally preferred rubber and a waffle pattern outsole, the shoe is absolutely high on traction and durability. Added to these features are the reflective elements used in the shoe to ensure that you are visible even when running in low visibility conditions, keeping you safe. Belonging to the Nike+ range, the Nike Lunarswift+ is compatible with all Nike+ products and actually talks to your iPod nano and other compatible guaging devices. So enjoy those long runs through all seasons in this pleasurable range of Nike Lunarswift+ shoes. description: TRAIN BETTER, STRAIN LESSER The first of the ZigTech range of reebok shoes, the reebok ZigFuel is a huge favourite among those who love to run and feel the energy returning with every stride they take. Built with patented sole technology, the reebok ZigFuel maximizes energy return to the feet, offering a soft and springy ride: a complete energy drink for your feet that makes your key leg muscles so that you can do more. Fuel your every stride Replete with a DMX Sheer cushioning that minimizes shock on impact, and a PU sockliner that provides a smooth, cushioned and silky touch to the feet, the Reebok ZigFuel is one of the lightest cross trainers ever created. The upper is made of synthetic mesh and overlays for ample breathability and structural support. It is also employed with reflective properties to make tech shoe visible and safe even in low light conditions. Equipped with a padded tongue, collar and soft inner lining, the Reebok ZigFuel provides an absolutely snug and comfortable Fit. The outsole of the shoe is designed in the patented zig-zag pattern using DMX Shear foam. This is separated into a different panel altogether from heel to mid-foot and onto the forefoot to reduce impact on key muscle groups when running, providing a smooth heel to toe transition. Energetic from kick-off Light and energetic from the word Go, the Reebok ZigFuel reduces impact on the heel, which is especially beneficial for midfoot to heelstrike runners who land on their heels first. The Zig technology, coupled with the DMX Shear cushioning panels reduces impact and evenly distributes shock, returning maximum energy to the feet. This reduced heel stress and extra comfort allows you to run longer and stronger. In short, if you're looking for a shoe that adds fuel to your runs with that extra cushioned support and strainless experience for your shins, feet and glutes, the ZigFuel is what you need. description: SANDY WALK FOR SHAPELY LEGS Emulate the feel of walking on sand and shape up your legs and butt with reebok EasyTone Reeinspire II shoes. An absolute hit with those who love that to-die-for body, the reebok EasyTone Reeinspire II sneakers are fitted with balance pods in the outsole that create that mild instability to help you strengthen key muscles of your shins, glutes and feet, and burn those extra calories in style. Moving air that burns calories Optimized with Moving Air technology, this shoe activates key muscles in the calves and quads, reducing overall body stress. This innovative fitness shoe is engineered with built-in balance pods in certain points that transfer air in response to your stride. Such air movement creates micro instability with every step you take, forcing the leg muscles to work harder, increasing strength and endurance similar to what happens when walking on sand. Added to this is the DMX Shear cushioning in the Reebok EasyTone Inspire that absorbs shock on impact, enhancing comfort for the feet even during long runs. Added to the DMX Shear technology is the traditional foam base that makes the sneaker three times softer and helps you burn more calories. Even better is its SmoothFit leather and mesh upper that is practically devoid of seams, allowing your feet an abrasion-free ride.
